title: Method Level 2D — Application
summary: Eighth notes arrive in D position, G position, and A minor — faster, more musical pieces with both hands.

exercises.title: D Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Right hand introduces pairs of eighth notes within D position.
exercises.goal: Play eighth-note pairs evenly within D position, keeping F-sharp accurate.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Right hand explores eighth notes through G position up to D5.
exercises.goal: Play eighth-note runs in G position evenly and in time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Right hand introduces eighth notes in A minor position.
exercises.goal: Play eighth-note figures in A minor with a flowing, dark character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Lively Dance
exercises.summary: Right hand plays a lively D-position dance in 2/4 with eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth notes even at a dance tempo in 2/4.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Bass Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Left hand plays eighth-note runs through D position.
exercises.goal: Play D-position eighth notes in bass clef with accurate F-sharp.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Bass Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Left hand plays eighth-note runs through G position.
exercises.goal: Play G-position eighth notes in bass clef with even tone.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Bass Eighth Notes
exercises.summary: Left hand plays eighth-note figures in A minor bass position.
exercises.goal: Play A minor eighth notes in bass clef with a flowing, expressive quality.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Song with Eighths
exercises.summary: Right hand sings a D melody with eighth notes while left hand holds the bass.
exercises.goal: Play eighth-note melody figures over a steady left-hand bass.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Song with Eighths
exercises.summary: Right hand plays a G melody with eighth notes above a bass line.
exercises.goal: Balance eighth-note melody figures over a left-hand bass in G position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Song with Eighths
exercises.summary: A minor melody with eighth notes over a sustained bass.
exercises.goal: Play eighth-note figures in A minor with an expressive, flowing character.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Waltz with Eighths
exercises.summary: Both hands in a D-position waltz with eighth-note decoration.
exercises.goal: Add eighth-note ornamentation to a waltz melody in D position.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Waltz with Eighths
exercises.summary: Both hands in a G-position waltz with eighth-note figures.
exercises.goal: Coordinate eighth-note waltz decoration in G position with both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Lively Both Hands
exercises.summary: Both hands in a lively D-position dance in 2/4 with eighth notes.
exercises.goal: Coordinate eighth-note dance figures in both hands in 2/4 time.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Lively Both Hands
exercises.summary: Both hands in a lively G-position dance with eighth notes in 2/4.
exercises.goal: Keep eighth-note figures clean and in time in G position, both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Dance
exercises.summary: Both hands in a three-beat A minor dance with eighth-note figures.
exercises.goal: Play an A minor waltz-character dance with eighth notes in both hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Musical Piece
exercises.summary: Six-measure D-position piece mixing eighth notes and longer values with both hands.
exercises.goal: Shape a complete musical phrase in D position with varied rhythm and two hands.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: G Musical Piece
exercises.summary: Six-measure G-position piece with eighth-note figures and both hands.
exercises.goal: Shape a complete G-position musical phrase with eighth notes and bass support.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: A Minor Nocturne
exercises.summary: A slow, expressive A minor piece with eighth-note ornaments and a sustained bass.
exercises.goal: Play a lyrical minor-mode piece, using eighth notes to ornament the melody.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: D Application Song
exercises.summary: Six-measure right-hand D-position song mixing eighth notes with a musical arc.
exercises.goal: Play a complete musical statement in D position with eighth-note variety.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.

exercises.title: Application Capstone
exercises.summary: Six-measure grand-staff D-position capstone with eighth-note melody and bass support.
exercises.goal: Demonstrate Level 2D mastery: eighth notes, D position, both hands, musical phrasing.

license.notes: Written for the open starter curriculum.
